testcase.name: config ownership metadata > reports required ownership violations
config ownership metadata > accepts present required values
config ownership metadata > validates ownership after loading configuration
loadStynxConfiguration SSM loading > loads paged SSM values using the default environment prefix
loadStynxConfiguration SSM loading > loads SSM values using an explicit prefix and default client config
loadStynxConfiguration SSM loading > uses the dev SSM prefix fallback and accepts empty parameter pages
loadStynxConfiguration SSM loading > reports schema validation failures after merging defaults and env
loadStynxConfiguration SSM loading > ignores empty ownership metadata entries
loadStynxConfiguration SSM loading > exposes config values and optional module metadata through StynxConfigService
StynxCoreModule > wires sync and async option providers plus global infrastructure
StynxErrorFilter > forwards plain HttpException with its status + response body
StynxErrorFilter > translates StynxError into the standard envelope at exception.status
StynxErrorFilter > warns for client StynxError responses and errors for server failures
StynxErrorFilter > omits context from the body when StynxError carries none
StynxErrorFilter > translates via ErrorTranslator when locale + translator are available
StynxErrorFilter > rethrows when the exception is neither HttpException nor StynxError
StynxErrorFilter > moduleRef resolution gracefully returns undefined when token unknown
RequestContextInterceptor > generates a UUIDv7 request id when none provided and sets X-Request-Id
RequestContextInterceptor > honors a valid X-Request-Id header from the caller
RequestContextInterceptor > throws BadRequestException when X-Request-Id is provided but invalid
RequestContextInterceptor > extracts header from first element when value is an array
RequestContextInterceptor > extracts the first locale from Accept-Language header
RequestContextInterceptor > extracts locale from the first array header value and trims it before comma parsing
RequestContextInterceptor > generates a fresh request id when the caller header is an array without a string first value
RequestContextInterceptor > ignores Accept-Language when only whitespace
RequestContextInterceptor > ignores Accept-Language when the first language segment is empty
RequestContextInterceptor > binds tenantId from request.tenantId when present
RequestContextInterceptor > falls back to stynxClaims.tenantId when request.tenantId absent
RequestContextInterceptor > resolves actorId from stynxClaims.sub first and sessionId from sid
RequestContextInterceptor > falls back to principal.id, then actor.id, then user.id
RequestContextInterceptor > propagates handler errors through the observable
RequestContextInterceptor > unsubscribes the downstream subscription on teardown
RequestContextInterceptor > exposes seed state inside the CLS scope during handler execution
RequestContextInterceptor > does not set tenantId/actorId/locale/sessionId when none are derivable
RequestContext > throws when read outside an active request context
RequestContext > exposes values inside an active request context and allows internal patching
RequestContext > throws when patching outside an active request context
RequestContext > reports inactive state and opens system context without inherited actor
RequestContext > inherits actor id when opening a system context from an active request
request id helpers > generates a UUIDv7-shaped request id
request id helpers > encodes the current millisecond timestamp in the UUIDv7 prefix
request id helpers > normalizes valid external request ids
request id helpers > rejects UUIDv7-shaped substrings embedded in longer values
SecretLoader > caches the secret value within ttlMs
SecretLoader > refetches when forceRefresh=true
SecretLoader > refetches when the cached secret expires exactly at the current time
SecretLoader > refetches after invalidating a cached secret
SecretLoader > uses default 5-minute TTL when not configured
SecretLoader > uses configured secretCacheTtlMs
SecretLoader > constructs a SecretsManagerClient with no config when none provided
SecretLoader > constructs a SecretsManagerClient with configured client options
SecretLoader > throws SecretLoadError when the SDK returns no SecretString
SecretLoader > throws SecretLoadError on connection-like errors
SecretLoader > rethrows non-connection errors
SecretLoader > refreshes a cached secret after a connection-like run failure
SecretLoader > does not refresh after non-connection run failures
SecretLoader > does not refresh after non-Error run failures
SystemContext > requires a readable reason and records an audit event
SystemContext > records active actor id from the request context when available
SystemContext > rejects reasons shorter than 10 characters
SystemContext > rejects reasons that are only long enough before trimming
SystemContext > accepts a trimmed 10-character reason and stores the trimmed value
SystemContext > current() throws SystemContextRequiredError when no system context is active
SystemContext > current() returns the active SystemExecutionContext set by withSystemContext
SystemContext > defaults to a no-op sink when none is injected
SystemContext > withSystemContext helper delegates to the SystemContext instance
